basic_details.job_title: NCRTC Additional General Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Capital Region Transport Corporation (NCRTC) Additional General Manager Notification 2026 has been released on 29 May 2026 on the official website of NCRTC. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NCRTC Additional General Manager Recruitment 2026.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NCRTC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
